Description: Unique Learner Identification Number (3-letter state prefix + 8 digits). Primary key under Nigeria's 2026 Federal LIN policy. NOT a model feature.
Learner's given name. Authentic Nigerian names (Yoruba/Igbo/Hausa/other); gender-matched. Administrative field — NOT a model feature.
Learner's surname. Authentic Nigerian surnames. Administrative field — NOT a model feature.
Nigerian academic session, e.g. '2024/2025'.
Learner's gender: Male or Female.
Learner's age in years at time of record.
Stage of basic education: Primary, Junior Secondary, or Senior Secondary.
Specific class label: Primary 1–6, JSS 1–3, or SSS 1–3.
Public (government-funded) or Private school.
Socioeconomic tier: Low, Medium, or High.
Highest educational attainment of parent/guardian: No Formal Education, Primary, Secondary, or Tertiary.
One-way home-to-school distance in kilometres.
Proportion of school days attended in the current term (0.20–0.97). Generated via a Beta distribution stratified by income, distance, and bullying.
Whether the learner has the required textbooks: Yes or No.
Whether the learner has been identified as a bullying victim: Yes or No.
Overall term grade (0–100) for two sessions ago (oldest of the three past terms).
Overall term grade (0–100) for the previous-previous term.
Overall term grade (0–100) for the immediately preceding term (most recent past).

Stage within the current term at which this record was captured. 1 = Pre-CA1 (no assessments yet); 2 = Post-CA1 (first CA completed); 3 = Post-MidTerm (mid-term test completed); 4 = Post-Exam (all assessments completed). Distribution: Stage 1=15%, Stage 2=25%, Stage 3=30%, Stage 4=30%.
Flag: 1 if the First Continuous Assessment has been sat, 0 otherwise. A score of 0 with CA1_Available=0 means 'not yet taken', not 'zero marks'.
First Continuous Assessment score, current term (out of 20). 0 when CA1_Available = 0.
Flag: 1 if the Mid-Term Test has been sat, 0 otherwise.
Mid-term test score, current term (out of 20). 0 when MidTerm_Available = 0.
Flag: 1 if the End-of-Term Examination has been sat, 0 otherwise.
End-of-term examination score, current term (out of 60). 0 when Exam_Available = 0.
Sum of all completed assessment scores in the current term (0–100). 0 at Stage 1; grows as more assessments are completed.
Maximum marks achievable given the current Term_Stage: 0 at Stage 1 / 20 at Stage 2 / 40 at Stage 3 / 100 at Stage 4.
Current_Score_So_Far / Max_Possible_So_Far. Stage-normalised performance: directly comparable across all stages. NaN at Stage 1 (no current-term data exists). KEY feature for the early warning model.

Number of subjects in which the learner scored below the pass mark (0–9). -1 at Stages 1–3 (sentinel value meaning 'not yet determinable'). Only populated at Stage 4 when all scores are available. The ML pipeline must handle -1 appropriately (e.g. encode as missing).
Binary target variable: 1 = At Risk of Dropping Out, 0 = Not at Risk. Computed via a weighted logistic risk model incorporating all available signals at the record's Term_Stage.
